title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 46.090 - Harrison
text:
46.090.  Harrison. — Beginning at the southeast corner of section twenty-five of township sixty-two of range twenty-six, west; thence with the range line between ranges twenty-five and twenty-six to the northern boundary line of the state; thence west with said boundary to where the line between ranges twenty-nine and thirty intersect the same; thence south with the range line between ranges twenty-nine and thirty to the southwest corner of section thirty of township sixty-two, range twenty-nine; thence east with the subdivisional lines to the place of beginning.
(RSMo 1939 § 13566) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11907; 1919 § 9309; 1909 § 3526
